overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a foggy industrial harbor district in Saint Denis. The character moves from wooden docks onto train tracks, passes under a metal bridge, and continues through muddy industrial streets toward a factory complex with tall smokestacks.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock walkway transitioning to railway tracks

events.description: steps off wooden dock platform onto dirt ground and train tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward the train tracks, passing workers on the left

notable_agents.action: worker in suspenders walking along the dock railing

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock surface with metal railings on the left side
rusted metal safety railing along the edge of the dock
tall wooden masts of docked ships visible through the fog in the harbor
large wooden industrial warehouse with sloped roof adjacent to the dock
metal train tracks running parallel to the dock area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a foggy wooden dock with the character walking toward train tracks. Metal railings line the left side with ship masts visible in the distant harbor fog. The character steps off the wooden platform onto dirt ground near the tracks around the 7-second mark.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side moving parallel to the tracks

agents.ego_description: walking along the train tracks toward the metal bridge in the distance

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with large wheels moving along the path parallel to the tracks

entered.detail: large metal railway bridge with BELT LINE signage spanning across the tracks ahead
stacked wooden barrels and crates beside the tracks
weathered wooden industrial building with loading dock

segments.scene_description: Walking along the railway tracks through an industrial corridor, the character approaches a large metal truss bridge. A horse-drawn carriage passes on the right. The wooden dock and harbor recede into the fog behind as industrial warehouses line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial railway underpass with iron fencing

events.description: passes underneath the metal truss bridge into shadow
rider on white horse approaches from ahead and passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: walking under the bridge and continuing along the tracks past industrial buildings and iron fences

notable_agents.action: rider on white horse approaching and passing by on the tracks

entered.detail: tall black iron fence with stone pillars enclosing an industrial yard
multi-story brick warehouse with arched windows and metal gates
industrial building with FREIGHT YARD COLLECTION painted on the side

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the metal bridge into a darker, enclosed space with iron fences and brick industrial buildings on the right. A rider on a white horse passes by heading in the opposite direction. The environment feels more confined with the bridge overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront industrial area with muddy roads

events.description: horse rider passes by quickly on the left side heading toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking along the muddy road with the waterfront visible to the left, passing the Saint Denis building

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback moving quickly past toward the waterfront

entered.detail: weathered wooden building with SAINT DENIS signage painted on the facade
open water of the harbor visible through the fog with distant ships
leafless trees lining the waterfront path
wooden telegraph poles with multiple cross-arms and wires

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wide waterfront area with the harbor visible through the fog on the left. The character passes a building with SAINT DENIS signage. Bare trees and utility poles line the muddy path as a horse rider passes by heading toward the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial factory approach with tall smokestacks

events.description: approaching large factory complex with prominent smokestacks emitting dark smoke

agents.ego_description: walking toward the factory building with tall smokestacks, passing a red train car on the left

entered.detail: red wooden boxcar sitting on a siding track
large brick factory building with multiple tall smokestacks emitting smoke
three tall industrial chimneys releasing dark smoke into the foggy sky
railway signal tower with semaphore arms
tall red brick wall enclosing the factory grounds

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive industrial factory with tall smokestacks dominating the skyline. A red train car sits on tracks to the left. The ground becomes muddier with puddles reflecting the gray sky. The factory complex looms ahead through the fog, marking the transition to a heavy industrial zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty harbor dock into the heart of a heavy industrial district. It begins on a foggy wooden platform where ship masts loom in the distance, moving forward as the character steps off the dock and onto dirt ground beside railway tracks. As the camera advances through an industrial corridor, the open harbor recedes into the fog and the scene becomes more confined, passing under a massive metal truss bridge flanked by brick buildings and iron fences. The environment then opens back up into a wide waterfront area marked by Saint Denis signage and utility poles before turning toward a dense industrial zone. Finally, the path leads through muddy puddles and past a red train car toward a massive factory complex with towering smokestacks dominating the gray skyline.
